heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–628, § 1(b)82 Stat. 1320Oct. 22, 1968
label: 257 to 257i Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 90–628, § 1(b)82 Stat. 1320Oct. 22, 1968
notes: Section 257, acts , ; , ; , , , set dimensions for standard hampers and round stave baskets.May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 145 Stat. 685June 28, 1954, ch. 406, § 168 Stat. 301Pub. L. 88–516, § 178 Stat. 697Aug. 30, 1964
Section 257a, acts , ; , , , set dimensions for standard splint baskets.May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 245 Stat. 685Pub. L. 88–516, § 278 Stat. 697Aug. 30, 1964
Section 257b, , , provided for promulgation of regulations allowing reasonable variations in hampers and baskets.act May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 345 Stat. 686
Section 257c, , , required approval by Secretary of Agriculture of manufacturer’s dimension specifications for hampers and baskets.act May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 445 Stat. 686

Section 257d, acts , ; , , , set out penalties for violations and covered guaranty given by manufacturers and sellers of hampers and baskets as to their correctness.May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 545 Stat. 686Pub. L. 88–516, § 378 Stat. 697Aug. 30, 1964
Section 257e, , , provided for seizure of illegal hampers and baskets, and procedure covering their condemnation.act May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 645 Stat. 686
Section 257f, , , allowed manufacture of hampers and baskets for foreign sale in conformity with foreign specifications.act May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 745 Stat. 687

Section 257g, acts , ; , , placed upon the United States Attorney the duty to prosecute for violations of sections 257 to 257i of this title.May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 845 Stat. 687June 25, 1948, ch. 646, § 162 Stat. 909
Section 257h, , , provided for promulgation of regulations covering examinations and tests by Secretary of Agriculture.act May 21, 1928, ch. 664, § 945 Stat. 687
Section 257i, , , authorized Secretary of Agriculture to cooperate with other agencies in carrying out sections 257 to 257i of this title.act May 21, 1968, ch. 664, § 1045 Stat. 687
Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective 60 days after , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 22, 1968section 3 of Pub. L. 90–628section 251 of this title
